changeSet.author: oe-dev

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.localization WHERE description = 'banner.menu.adhoc.report'

changeSet.comment: Adds localization entries for Ad-Hoc Report menu item
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.localization (id, description, english, french, lastupdated) VALUES (nextval('localization_seq'), 'banner.menu.adhoc.report', 'Ad-Hoc Report', 'Rapport Ad-Hoc', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), (nextval('localization_seq'), 'banner.menu.adhoc.report.tooltip', 'Create custom ad-hoc reports for Patient and Sample data', 'Créer des rapports ad-hoc personnalisés pour les données Patient et Échantillon', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
